title: Vacancy
doc_html:
§2488.32.  Vacancy

In the event there is a vacancy in the office of the city judge, because of death, resignation or otherwise, the office shall be filled as provided by law.  

Acts 1970, No. 424, §12.
doc_text:
§2488.32.  Vacancy
In the event there is a vacancy in the office of the city judge, because of death, resignation or otherwise, the office shall be filled as provided by law.
Acts 1970, No. 424, §12.
